metadata.title: Titanium Cards | Debit Cards | Card Banking | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Mastercard Titanium Debit Card is the first Titanium debit card launched in Pakistan. The debit card comes packed with benefits for the frequent traveller offering free access to airport lounges across the Middle East, coupled with a wide array of exclusive offers and discounts within Pakistan and worldwide.

content: the PIN Change option and follow the subsequent instructions. Alternatively, you may also call 21) 111-331-331 or 111-331-332 and speak to a Phone Banking Officer to have your ATM PIN changed. What happens if I forget to collect my card from the ATM? In order to provide added security, our ATMs are programmed to capture the card if the customer forgets to take it back after any transaction. Similarly, if you forget to take the cash within a pre-set time limit i.e. (20 seconds), the machine will take back the cash and your transaction will be reversed. You may also contact the branch (staff) or alternatively use ATM telephone located at the ATM vestibule to a Phone Banking Officer. What if the ATM is out of service? In the unlikely event that a particular is out of service, a message to this effect would be indicated on the screen. Various factors could cause this condition, which include telecommunication problems, hardware breakdowns, power shut downs, etc. If you encounter an out of service ATM, please proceed to the next available ATM. You may contact our 111-331-331 or 111-331-332 to locate nearest available ATMs. What should I do in case my card is lost or stolen? In case you lose your card or it gets stolen, immediately call or 111-331-332 and report the card. You are protected against fraudulent transactions made on your card from the time you notify Meezan Bank. Who should I contact if I encounter any problems abroad? MasterCard Global Customer Assistance Service helpline numbers offers instant convenience. Dial the number of the country you are travelling to for general information and reporting issues regarding your debit card. Can I use my card at ATMs besides Meezan Bank, in Pakistan and abroad? Yes, can use your card at ATMs displaying the “1 LINK/M-Net /MasterCard” logo, across Pakistan and abroad. How long can the card be used? You can make purchases and withdraw cash using the MasterCard Debit Card until the expiration date shown on the card (which is 5 years from the issuance date). If I have multiple Meezan Bank accounts, which ones will I access with my debit card? You can designate your primary account by submitting a request with 21) 111-331-331 or 111-331-332). You can access your funds available from linked account on ATMs but can only use your primary account for purchases.
